name: Hoo La Beef B1
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut flank steak against grain into 1/5 inch thick slices, approximately 2 inches long.
2. Mix all ingredients except corn oil in a bowl.
3. Marinate the meat for 1 hour to allow flavors to penetrate.
4. Preheat wok or large skillet over high heat.
5. Heat corn oil in the wok until it begins to smoke.
6. Add the marinade and beef slices to the hot oil, stirring occasionally.
7. Cook until the desired doneness is achieved.
Temperature: HOT
Effort: AVERAGE
Time: 01:20
Occasion: HOLIDAY
Source: YEN CHING
Comments: SOUTH BRENTWOOD, ST. LOUIS
Beverage: WARM SAKI
